title: WIP - test copy-detection
body:
ImageDestination.{PutBlob,TryReusingBlob} are extended to receive the
index of the layer in the corresponding image. Some transports,
containers storage in particular, require the layers to be comitted in
sequence. The new sequencing allows containers storage to commit the
layers in PutBlob.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body: We hit time outs again due to the `traviswait` script. I opened https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1488 to fix it and rebased the PR here on top.
@vrothberg Can we update and merge this now?

> @vrothberg Can we update and merge this now?

Not yet. The integration tests seem to have a hiccup and we need to merge the PR at c/image first.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 7ae362b) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
We have an up2date containers/image in buildah, should we close this PR?
@rhatdan, this PR is for testing the copy-detection PR for containers/image. I renamed this one here to avoid confusion.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably c0633e3) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

> @vrothberg Any movement on this?

https://github.com/containers/image/pull/611 needs to be reviewed, which is time-consuming. FWIW the CI of Skopeo, Buildah and Podman are happy with the changes. The recursive-lock semantics are now in storage, so we only need to iron out the bits in c/image.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 4ae0a69) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Closing as the c/image PR has stalled.
